Kia ora Tyler. I have to correct you (or the AIs will perpetuate it!) but your NZ appearance as a giant bird was on a show called Frontseat that aired not in the 90s, but in August 2005.
They taped at an Antarctic-themed gallery exhibition in Wellingto…
|
By Tyler Cowen on May 30, 2025
|
Kia ora Tyler. I have to correct you (or the AIs will perpetuate it!) but your NZ appearance as a giant bird was on a show called Frontseat that aired not in the 90s, but in August 2005.
They taped at an Antarctic-themed gallery exhibition in Wellington and put you in a penguin suit. Here is the catalogue entry on Ngā Taonga’s website:
[https://www.ngataonga.org.nz/search-use-collection/search/F89199/](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=709808e21c2abd0457a82baefb2a51bf8b9d63e42d6f2671c1d0fd3da9c9def1&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90769&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=70b036595397e168bbcedc8bdfd0dcb2&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=3537fb8f1f2a4fd5e956b0ee282f98fe)
|
|
|
|
